name: Conformance: Capability Missing (G23 dispatch refusal)
description: Single-node workflow whose node declares `requires: ['conformance.never-provided']`. The engine MUST refuse to dispatch the node and terminate the run with `error.code = 'capability_not_provided'`. Spec: docs/wop-spec/v1/capabilities.md §'Runtime capabilities (future)' + docs/WORKFLOW_ORCHESTRATION_GAPS.md §G23.
